title: Leader as Network, Not IQ
html:
Leader as Network, Not IQ

Stub. The October 2019 teen-Yahir reframe: "The smartest [person] isn't the smartest [person] in the room — the smartest [person] is the one who surrounds himself with the smartest [people] and gets them to follow him." (2019 10 22 the smartest nigga isnt the smartest nigga in the room the s). Same shape as John Maxwell's "you've got to have people in your corner" line he was ingesting that summer (2019 08 12 keep things simple) and the CEO-decision frame in 2019 08 15 youve got to have some sort of credentials. This is where Yahir starts modeling leadership as a recruiting and follow-getting problem rather than an individual-brilliance problem.

Source summaries

  • 2019 10 22 the smartest nigga isnt the smartest nigga in the room the s
  • 2019 08 15 youve got to have some sort of credentials
